title: NIT Goa Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: National Institute of Technology Goa (NIT Goa)
short_info: Candidates as per official notification who have B.Tech/B.E./M.Tech./M.E./equivalent in relevant discipline with NET/GATE and minimum 6.5 CGPA or 60% marks are eligible to apply for these Junior Research Fellow (JRF) vacancies. The online application process for NIT Goa JRF Recruitment 2026 has started from 28 April 2026 and will remain open until 15 July 2026.

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow : B.Tech/B.E./M.Tech./M.E./equivalent in the relevant discipline with NET/GATE and at least 6.5 CGPA or 60 percent marks in aggregate from a recognized technical institute or university in a full-time program.

selection_process: Shortlisting on the basis of merit and need of the project Written Test and/or Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Goa to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
